name: OversightOnFHIR
title: Oversight-on-FHIR Implementation Guide
description: A draft IG representing the human oversight decision over agentic clinical AI output as first-class FHIR resources. Complementary to the HL7 AI Transparency on FHIR IG: that effort represents AI influence on clinical data; this profile represents the human decision (accept/edit/reject, with a structured reason) over agentic AI output.
